channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping outside mcdonalds, 10th July
item.description:
Fly tipping outside mcdonalds

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of builder's waste dumped on pavement, 10th July
item.description:
This bag of builder's waste was dumped on the pavement in the early hours of 9/7/26 near bins waiting to be emptied, presumably trying to trick the collectors into taking it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Flaxton Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin keeps being thrown, outside park., 9th July
item.description:
The bin outside the park gates, outside the café - lopeto, was thrown out by vandals tonight - kids, who have been plaguing the park for weeks. My friend saw them do it! A worker from cafe, put back in after. But it's not safe, as could be thrown in pond - injuring wildlife or hurled at people. Please, can you properly arrange, for it to be secured in the ground? Also, we need more patrols by Ward. As it's not safe in the evening, which is a joke. You have refused wardens - the only park Ranger, ceased many years ago. Money needs to be spent, Millions spent on the warehouse there, but none for security! Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-4, High Street, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard, 9th July
item.description:
Cardboard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stansfield Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Freezer, gas canister, plastic trays, 9th July
item.description:
Freezer, gas canister, plastic trays

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellefields Road, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: Estate agent sign, 9th July
item.description:
Estate agent sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This part of Radnor Road has not been swept, rubbish and old debris near the curbside, 9th July
item.description:
This stretch of Radnor Road needs sweeping as old debris and litter( bottles, cigarette butt's and general waste are still there, even though the previous report was declared as fixed The rubbish is still there and It can be found along the curb, where sometimes the cars are parked and all the way towards the junction with Commercial Way. Please check the part of Radnor Road from Freeda Corbet all the way to Commercial Way, Rubbish is on the curbside ( near the houses) and all the way where the brick garden wall is leading to Commercial Way. Please provide sweeping as well as litter picking . Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Radnor Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th July
item.description:
Woken up by a noise. Looked outside and saw a white flat back truck dispose of the whole load into the driveway of the house next door (Number 1, Academy Place) and then sped off.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Academy Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large cardboard box stuck behind a utility unit ., 9th July
item.description:
A large cardboard box left behind the utility unit on Peckham Hill Street. Please remove it. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet dumped in there for a while., 9th July
item.description:
Carpet flytiped and not been cleared. Please assist Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sister Mabel's Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please collect rubbish from this area, 9th July
item.description:
Litter has been left, please collect. Including deflated football on the green utility box here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Illegally parked Lime bikes on footway used by blind and visually impaired pedestrians, 9th July
item.description:
The bike numbers are illegible for the (visually impaired) poster but, hopefully, can be seen by Hackney Council staff.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Sandringham Road, Shacklewell, Greater London

item.title: Bus stop blocked by illegal parking, 9th July
item.description:
The bus stop is completely blocked by four cars. Buses not stopping because they can’t pull over so nobody can get on it off.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: St George’s Road, Beckenham – car park – one of th, 9th July
item.description:
St George’s Road, Beckenham – car park – one of the two height restriction poles seems broken per picture attached. Suggest need to take action eg make safe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins consistently fly tipped on Evering Road so bin staff do not empty, 9th July
item.description:
These residential bins are opposite Rectory Road station, so people often dump rubbish in them as they are exposed. They are now overflowing, so have not been collected for the last two weeks. This is not the residents' fault, so could they be emptied ASAP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working on Coleman Road opposite Dowlas Street again, 9th July
item.description:
Street light not working on Coleman Road opposite Dowlas Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
